name: Lebanese Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook eggplant in boiling salted water for 8-10 minutes, then drain well.
2. Saute onion, garlic, and mushrooms in olive oil until softened.
3. Add flour to the sauteed vegetables and stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add tomatoes and remaining ingredients, stirring to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and transfer the mixture to a lightly greased 1-quart casserole dish.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes.
